prompt: Order these medical milestones from earliest to latest

events.title: Ether anesthesia
events.fact: 1846 — first public demo of ether during surgery

events.title: Insulin first used
events.fact: 1922 — treats type 1 diabetes in human patient

events.title: Penicillin discovered
events.fact: 1928 — Alexander Fleming finds mold killing bacteria

events.title: First heart transplant
events.fact: 1967 — Christian Barnard performs surgery in Cape Town
